edges.subject: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM3-3B-Base
edges.description: SmolLM3-3B-Base uses intra-document attention masking similar to Llama 3 to enable faster and more stable long-context training; the README cites Llama 3 as the methodological source.

evidence.excerpt: **Intra-Document Masking:** During training, we use attention masking to ensure tokens from different documents in the same training sequence don't attend to each other. Similar to Llama 3, this helps with faster and more stable long context training
evidence.explanation: Direct attribution to Llama 3 as the source of the intra-document masking strategy used in SmolLM3 pretraining.

evidence.excerpt: Similar to Llama 3, this helps with faster and more stable long context training while maintaining short context performance. ... we used LLama 3.2 tokenizer as is
evidence.explanation: Documents intra-document masking borrowed from Llama 3 and tokenizer reuse from Llama 3.2 (a Llama 3 family release).

evidence.excerpt: Similar to Llama 3, this helps with faster and more stable long context training while maintaining short context performance.
evidence.explanation: Source attributes the intra-document masking choice to a recipe popularized by Llama 3.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/fineweb-edu-classifier
edges.description: The FineWeb-Edu classifier is a sequence-classification head finetuned from the Snowflake arctic-embed-m BERT-like base model, with embedding and encoder layers frozen during training.

evidence.explanation: train_edu_bert.py default base model parameter is Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-m.

evidence.excerpt: model = AutoModelForSequenceClassification.from_pretrained(args.base_model_name, num_labels=1, ...); for param in model.bert.embeddings.parameters(): param.requires_grad = False; for param in model.bert.encoder.parameters(): param.requires_grad = False
evidence.explanation: Loads Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-m as base, freezes encoder, trains only regression head.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/ablation-model-fineweb-edu
edges.description: The FineWeb-Edu ablation pretraining model trains on the classifier-filtered fineweb-edu subset of FineWeb; it appears as one of the data-recipe ablation models in eval.slurm alongside ablation-model-fineweb-v1, ablation-model-c4, etc.

evidence.explanation: eval.slurm lists ablation-model-fineweb-edu as the FineWeb-Edu data-recipe ablation pretrain checkpoint.

evidence.excerpt: The FineWeb-Edu ablation model (trained on 350B tokens) is available at https://huggingface.co/HuggingFaceFW/ablation-model-fineweb-edu.
evidence.explanation: Pairs the ablation model with the FineWeb-Edu corpus as its training data.

evidence.excerpt: FineWeb-Edu, contains 1.3 trillion tokens. FineWeb-Edu is specifically optimized for educational content.
evidence.explanation: Identifies HuggingFaceFW/fineweb-edu (1.3T threshold 3) as the training data for this ablation model.

evidence.excerpt: The FineWeb-Edu ablation model (trained on 350B tokens) is available at https://huggingface.co/HuggingFaceFW/ablation-model-fineweb-edu.
evidence.explanation: Identifies FineWeb-Edu as the training corpus for ablation-model-fineweb-edu (350B tokens sampled).

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/ablation-model-fineweb-edu
edges.description: fineweb-edu was constructed by running the HuggingFaceFW/fineweb-edu-classifier on FineWeb (run_edu_bert.py) to score each document and select the educational subset; the ablation-model-fineweb-edu model therefore inherits the classifier's inclusion decisions.

evidence.explanation: The classifier scores HuggingFaceFW/fineweb to construct the filtered output that fineweb-edu (and ablation-model-fineweb-edu) inherit.

evidence.excerpt: We then built FineWeb-Edu by filtering out samples with scores lower than 3. This removed 92% of the dataset, leaving us with 1.3T educational tokens.
evidence.explanation: Documents that the classifier's threshold-3 inclusion decision produced the FineWeb-Edu corpus that the ablation model trained on.

evidence.excerpt: Applying the classifier to the 15 trillion tokens of FineWeb required 6,000 H100 GPU hours.
evidence.explanation: Documents the classifier's role as the filter that produced the FineWeb-Edu training data.

evidence.excerpt: We then built FineWeb-Edu by filtering out samples with scores lower than 3. This removed 92% of the dataset, leaving us with 1.3T educational tokens.
evidence.explanation: Documents that the classifier filtered FineWeb to produce the FineWeb-Edu corpus on which the ablation model was trained.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/ablation-model-fineweb-edu
edges.description: Source content of fineweb-edu is HuggingFaceFW/fineweb (the parent crawl); the educational filter only selects a subset, so ablation-model-fineweb-edu's training tokens originate in fineweb.

evidence.explanation: run_edu_bert.slurm names HuggingFaceFW/fineweb as the source corpus the classifier scores into fineweb-edu.

evidence.excerpt: We built FineWeb-Edu by filtering out samples with scores lower than 3. This removed 92% of the dataset, leaving us with 1.3 trillion educational tokens.
evidence.explanation: Documents that FineWeb-Edu is a filtered subset of FineWeb, so the ablation model trained on FineWeb-derived content.

evidence.excerpt: FineWeb-Edu dataset consists of 1.3T tokens ... of educational web pages filtered from FineWeb dataset.
evidence.explanation: Establishes that the ablation model's training content was sampled from FineWeb (via the FineWeb-Edu filtered subset).

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/fineweb-edu-classifier
edges.description: Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct was tried as an alternative annotator and as a jury member; the team rejected it because it did not adhere to the score scale (overly generous scores).

evidence.excerpt: Mixtral-8x7B tended to be more generous, not fully adhering to the score scale.
evidence.explanation: Identifies Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct as a tested annotator variant whose scores were judged unreliable.

evidence.excerpt: we experimented with several models including Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct and Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct, Llama-3-70B-Instruct as well as a jury gathering the scores from these three models.
evidence.explanation: Names Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct as one of the annotator-model alternatives the team ablated for the classifier.

evidence.excerpt: We also experimented with different LLMs: Llama3-70B-Instruct, Mixtral-8x-7B-Instruct, and Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct.
evidence.explanation: Describes Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct as a design-space variant for the annotator role tested in the team's own ablations.

edges.subject: HuggingFaceFW/fineweb-edu-classifier
edges.description: Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct was tried as an alternative annotator and produced scores similar to Llama-3-70B-Instruct; not used in the released classifier supervision.

evidence.excerpt: Llama 3 and Mixtral-8x22B produced similar scores
evidence.explanation: Card lists Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct as a design-space alternative annotator the team evaluated against Llama-3.

evidence.excerpt: Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct, Llama-3-70B-Instruct as well as a jury gathering the scores from these three models
evidence.explanation: Names Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct as one of the annotator-model alternatives the team ablated.

evidence.excerpt: We also experimented with different LLMs: Llama3-70B-Instruct, Mixtral-8x-7B-Instruct, and Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct.
evidence.explanation: Lists Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct as a design-space variant for the annotator role tested in the team's own ablations.
